attacking_style: Prioritizes early breakaway positioning to control intermediate sprint points rather than stage victories. Demonstrates classification-focused attacking with energy conservation tactics.
team_tactics: Operates with autonomy in breakaways, focusing on strategic sprint point collection rather than requiring heavy team support for stage wins.
terrain_preference: Stages with accessible breakaways and multiple intermediate sprints where classification points can be harvested efficiently without excessive climbing or pace.
vulnerability: Single race sample limits assessment; likely struggles when breakaways are heavily controlled or when pure climbing power or flat sprint speed is required for points.
key_patterns: Targets classification jerseys through systematic intermediate sprint point collection in breakaways
Demonstrates tactical efficiency by conserving energy after securing sprint points rather than chasing stage win
Shows race intelligence in identifying uncontested opportunities within breakaway dynamics
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation from February 2023 insufficient to determine trajectory; tactics were effective but sample too limited
